subject: english
learning_objectives: State useful hints for summary writing tasks
Select only relevant information from a passage
Answer summary questions briefly and in own words

sections.heading: Useful Hints
sections.content: Indicate which part of the question is being answered. Pick only the information demanded by the question.

sections.heading: Writing Reminders
sections.content: Keep strictly to the passage and be as brief as possible. Use your own words rather than copying whole sentences.
